hyperedges.label: Role System: RoleManager broadcasts RoleData changes to RoleAbilityController, HUD, and RoleSelectionUI
Player Health Pipeline: PlayerState fires OnHealthChanged consumed by HUD and EffectSystem revival
Debug Toolset: RigidbodyWatcher, AnimatorDebugger, DebugPanel, and DebugPanelHUD form a suite of runtime diagnostics
Resource Harvest and Ritual Victory Flow

nodes.label: Remy Character
nodes.description: Unity game character named Remy with bottom clothing material

nodes.label: Warm Brown / Sandy Blonde Color Palette
nodes.norm_label: warm brown / sandy blonde color palette

nodes.label: Face Surface Detail (eyes, nose, mouth, ears)
nodes.norm_label: face surface detail (eyes, nose, mouth, ears)

nodes.label: Remy Body Mesh (head, torso, arms, hands, feet, teeth, eyes)
nodes.norm_label: remy body mesh (head, torso, arms, hands, feet, teeth, eyes)

nodes.label: Remy Top Gloss Map
nodes.description: Near-black gloss/shininess mask for Remy's top garment; silhouette of sleeveless vest UV layout (front and back panels) with black fill indicating near-zero gloss — matte fabric surface with no sheen.

nodes.label: Remy Top Diffuse Map
nodes.description: Dark charcoal-grey diffuse/albedo texture for Remy's sleeveless top; UV layout shows front and back torso panels plus narrow sleeve-edge strips; subtle woven fabric grain visible across surface; V-neck collar cutout on front panel; thin black horizontal stripe band at lower hem.

nodes.label: Remy Top Specular Map
nodes.description: High-contrast black specular map for Remy's top; solid dark silhouette of the UV-unwrapped sleeveless vest (front and back panels visible); extremely low specular intensity indicating matte, non-reflective fabric material with no highlight.

nodes.label: Remy Bottom Diffuse Map
nodes.description: Olive/khaki-grey diffuse texture for Remy's pants; large lower section shows wide-leg trouser panels with a vertical centerline seam and subtle fabric grain; upper row of UV islands contains belt/waistband accessory pieces, pocket hardware, and small detail elements in darker olive-brown and forest-green tones; overall cargo-style or utility trouser silhouette.

nodes.label: Remy Bottom Normal Map
nodes.description: Tangent-space normal map (blue-purple dominant) for Remy's cargo pants; encodes micro-surface detail including fabric wrinkles across legs, raised waistband, belt loop geometry, front patch pockets, side seam creases, and accessory hardware topology; cyan highlights indicate outward-facing edges of pockets and loops; standard Unity-compatible tangent-space encoding.

nodes.label: Remy Top Garment (Sleeveless Vest)
nodes.description: Logical clothing asset representing Remy's sleeveless vest/tank-top: dark charcoal-grey woven fabric, V-neck collar, matte non-reflective surface, suitable for casual athletic or streetwear styling.

nodes.label: Remy Bottom Garment (Cargo Pants)
nodes.description: Logical clothing asset representing Remy's pants: olive/khaki-grey cargo-style trousers with front patch pockets, belt loops, waistband, utility hardware details, and fabric wrinkle micro-surface baked into normal map.

nodes.label: Remy Bottom Gloss Map
nodes.style: UV-unwrapped grayscale gloss map; overwhelmingly black indicating near-zero surface glossiness/roughness across all cloth panels; small white/grey highlight islands on accessory UV islands (buttons, loops, zipper pull) suggesting slightly higher gloss on hard-surface details; layout shows shorts bottom garment with belt-loop strips, waistband, fly panel, pocket shapes arranged around central leg panel
nodes.dominant_value: very low gloss (near 0.0) — matte fabric surface

nodes.label: Remy Bottom Specular Map
nodes.style: UV-unwrapped specular map; essentially identical layout and near-total black values to the gloss map — confirming very low specular reflectance across all cloth surfaces; same UV island arrangement (shorts, belt loops, waistband, pockets); uniform dark tone indicates a non-reflective, matte fabric material with minimal specular highlight contribution
nodes.dominant_value: very low specular intensity — non-reflective fabric

nodes.label: Ch10 Material 1001 Normal Map
nodes.style: Tangent-space normal map in standard blue-dominant encoding (RGB = XYZ surface normals); highly complex surface detail — shows a figure torso/upper body with elaborate decorative or ornamental surface features including raised emblem/crest shapes at top (crown-like or mandala-like symmetrical motifs), wrinkled/folded cloth across chest and lower body, anatomical body creases, and what appears to be a jacket or uniform with ornate embossed detailing; strong color variation from deep violet to light cyan indicates significant surface relief; UV layout appears continuous/UDIM-style for this material tile
nodes.dominant_value: high-detail tangent-space normals — complex cloth and ornamental surface

nodes.label: Ch10 Material 1001 Glossiness Map
nodes.style: Greyscale glossiness map matching the Ch10 1001 UV layout; predominantly dark-to-mid grey values across cloth body areas indicating low-to-moderate gloss; bright white specular highlight spots scattered across the surface represent highly polished or metallic detail elements (buttons, pins, medals, or decorative metal hardware); black regions correspond to matte fabric zones; the contrast between near-white highlights and dark background confirms a mixed-material surface (fabric + metal trim)
nodes.dominant_value: mixed — dark grey (matte fabric) with bright white accents (metallic/polished details)

nodes.label: Ch10 Material 1001 Specular Map
nodes.style: Greyscale specular map; uniformly very dark charcoal (approximately 15-20% luminance) with essentially no bright highlights — indicating an overall low specular reflectance material; in combination with the glossiness map's bright white metallic spots, this specular map suppresses the colour/intensity of specular contribution, likely controlling specular colour or intensity cap; the flatness suggests a Specular workflow where colour tint rather than intensity is primary purpose, and this map is near-black meaning achromatic/desaturated specular response
nodes.dominant_value: uniformly very dark — minimal specular intensity, achromatic

nodes.label: Ch10 Unity Game Character
nodes.description: 3D game character Ch10 — a zombie/undead horror character with decomposed flesh, blood splatter wounds, and dark blood-stained tactical clothing; two-material PBR setup in Unity; horror game aesthetic

nodes.label: Remy Bottom Material Set
nodes.description: PBR material for Remy bottom clothing — matte non-reflective fabric with very low gloss and specular values

nodes.label: Ch10 Material 1001 Set
nodes.description: PBR material 1001 for Ch10 — complex surface with ornate cloth, embossed decorative elements, and metallic hardware details; uses normal + glossiness + specular workflow

nodes.label: Ch10 Material 1001 Diffuse Map
nodes.description: UV-unfolded diffuse albedo map showing decomposed zombie flesh with heavy blood splatter, open wounds, decay markings; radially-symmetric UV layout; pale necrotic flesh tones with dark red blood; includes facial region and torso skin

nodes.label: Ch10 Material 1002 Diffuse Map
nodes.description: Diffuse albedo map for clothing/outfit; dark brownish-gray tactical vest or jacket with visible chest pockets; heavy blood staining in crimson; dark armor straps at upper portion; shoe soles visible bottom-right corner; UV-unfolded layout

nodes.label: Ch10 Material 1002 Normal Map
nodes.description: Tangent-space normal map encoding surface micro-geometry for clothing slot; dominant blue-purple hue with RGB directional color coding; reveals fabric wrinkle patterns, jacket/vest shape with chest pockets, clothing fold detail, stitch lines, shoe sole geometry baked in

nodes.label: Ch10 Material 1002 Specular Map
nodes.description: Specular reflectivity map; predominantly near-black indicating matte non-reflective clothing fabric; small colored patch top-left corner and lighter gray region bottom-left suggest minor specularity on accessories or shoe material; overall very low specular intensity consistent with worn fabric

nodes.label: Ch10 Material 1002 Glossiness Map
nodes.description: Grayscale glossiness/roughness map for clothing slot; predominantly very dark values indicating high surface roughness and matte finish; UV shapes reveal vest/jacket with chest pockets and shoe outlines; subtle mid-gray variations for slight sheen variation across fabric surfaces

nodes.label: Ch10 Material Slot 1001 (Body Skin)
nodes.description: Unity material slot 1001 for character Ch10 covering body skin geometry — zombie/undead creature flesh, upper torso, face

nodes.label: Ch10 Material Slot 1002 (Clothing/Outfit)
nodes.description: Unity material slot 1002 for character Ch10 covering clothing geometry — tactical vest/jacket with chest pockets, armor straps, footwear
